items.description:

✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

Unleash futuristic precision with the Laser Blade, a weapon that embodies cutting-edge technology and deadly efficiency. The blade emits a concentrated beam of laser energy, capable of slicing through the toughest materials with ease. Its sleek, ergonomic design ensures swift and fluid movements, allowing you to execute precise strikes with unparalleled accuracy. The Laser Blade's energy source is self-replenishing, ensuring it remains a reliable companion in extended battles. Equip the Laser Blade and experience the ultimate fusion of science and combat, making you an unstoppable force on the battlefield.

items.name: Late Antiquity "Narona Bandhelm" Helmet
items.description:
⚠ YOU ARE NOT ALLOWED TO USE THESE ITEMS FOR GAMES

"Some have accused our armies of cowardice, incompetence and lack of
 training. But on the contrary they were heroes, worthy of the greatest
 Roman traditions. They fought and died where they stood, and their valiant
 emperor died with them, refusing the disgrace of flight and true to the finest
 examples of our ancestors. The heaps of bones of those who fell around
 their emperor are the monument to their valour." - Libanius, Rhetorician of Antioch, on the events of the Battle of Adrianople.

The Narona Bandhelm is part of the family of bandhelmets that were introduced during the 5th Century. This find comes from Narona, Croatia, and was used into the 6th and possibly 7th centuries.

Created by: petrolevm
Modeled by: petrolevm
Textured by: petrolevm

petro is my goat 💜
